description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a sleek, rectangular deck with rounded ends and a slightly concave profile. The deck is finished in a solid black color, with a thin layer of wood visible along the edge, suggesting a multi-ply wooden construction. The skateboard is equipped with two sets of red wheels, each mounted on metal trucks that are attached to the underside of the deck. The wheels are classic in shape and size, suitable for street or park use. The top surface appears to be covered with black grip tape, providing traction for the rider. No visible graphics, logos, or additional design elements are present on the deck or wheels.
description: A classic black skateboard with a wooden edge, red wheels, and black grip tape, featuring a simple and unadorned design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, red wheels, and wooden edge.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the width of the deck and the solid black grip tape surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the deck, wheels, and edge details.
description_view_3: Opposite end view, mirroring view 1, showing the deck's width and grip tape.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, metallic, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern or graphics
